title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCV. Lullabies.
content:
I'll buy you a tartan bonnet,
        And some feathers to put on it,
        Tartan trews and a phillibeg,
        Because you are so like your daddy.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCV. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
